title: Cedar Design System – A Framework from Rei
content: # Rei Systems Directories Components Articles Blueprints Guides Glossary Biweekly Digest Created by Adobe Alaska Airlines Amazon Apple Atlassian Audi Basis Biings Brainly Carrefour Cash App CBRE Build Cisco Datadog Dell Docplanner eBay Elastic Esri General Electric Github GitLab Google GOV.UK Gusto Helly Hansen IBM Ideagen INPS Kajabi Kiwicom Lemon Squeezy Line LocalTapiola Michelin Microsoft Monday.com MongoDB Motorway Mozilla Nordhealth Ontario Orange Palantir Pinterest Pluralsight Porsche Razorpay Red Hat Salesforce Samsung Seek Segment ServiceNow Shopify Skoda Sprout Social SumUp Sunrise Teamleader Thumbtack Twilio U.S. Web UAE Uber Vercel Visa Washington Post Wikimedia Wise Wonderflow Workday WorkOS Zendesk Keep up with the latest in Design Systems Subscribe Cedar from Directories: Components: Cedar Design System is a comprehensive framework and set of guidelines created by REI, tailored for digital products and experiences, aligning with the brand's visual language. Design System distributes flexible design elements, typography, color system, and UI elements empowering teams with the tools needed to craft functional, reusable components while maintaining alignment with the brand. rectories: Components: Cedar Design System is a comprehensive framework and set of guidelines created by REI, tailored for digital products and experiences, aligning with the brand's visual language. Design System distributes flexible design elements, typography, color system, and UI elements empowering teams with the tools needed to craft functional, reusable components while maintaining alignment with the brand.
